ActionItems: Revisit after 2025 books close to confirm fixed-cost assumptions.
BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-envelope before deciding whether to lease a small client-meeting studio in Chestnut Hill. Pre-review with the bookkeeper.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Revisit once 2025 actuals are closed.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is roughly 5 full-service weddings per quarter at the current cost base. With 9 booked for spring 2026 there is comfortable headroom; even the slow winter stretch stays above the line.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $1,850/mo + $750 studio lease = $2,600/mo. At about $1,300 average net per wedding, $2,600 / $1,300 = 2 weddings per month to cover overhead.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Manageable. Spring 2026 bookings keep us well above break-even even with the added lease.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Lease small client-meeting studio in Chestnut Hill at $750/mo

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Tighter. At $850/mo the slow winter months dip close to break-even; would need one or two additional bookings to stay comfortable.
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Studio lease at $850/mo if utilities are bundled in
